title: oxalis peduncularis
intro: Oxalis peduncularis, also known as the 'Wood Sorrel', is a perennial plant species native to the Andean region of South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Oxalis peduncularis include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve symptoms of colds and flu, and may have antioxidant properties. Oxalis peduncularis is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, and can also be consumed raw as a culinary herb.
